Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Cigarette smoke and a[n]nervous tension fill the air...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I can muster up[n]the courage to enter...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A customer is walking[n]out. He looks defeated...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}No, don't say a word! I challenge you to a match![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...I guess my luck really has dried up.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You've helped me realize that gambling's a lost cause. Starting today, I'm stopping cold turkey.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Here's a little something to say thanks.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Anyway, you shouldn't be hanging around a place like this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's no use... I can't find[n]the courage to enter...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}If my {f 4 30 2 1 1 0} was at least[n]{f 4 31 2 5 1 0}, I might be able to go in...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I plucked up my {f 4 30 2 1 1 0}[n]and stepped onto the stairs...[n]{f 1 1}
